Andtech.Gooball 2.1.5+f0873dd8089b44f1ec2f7f1b4eba7f847d6e3bee
© Andtech Studios 2023

  open           (Default Verb) Open a Unity project with a Unity editor.

  build          Build a Unity project.

  test           Run tests on Unity project.

  run            Run arbitrary Unity commands.

  list           List installed editors.

  hide           Hide assets from the Unity asset database.

  set-version    Set the version number of a Unity project.

  serve          Start a local web server.

  help           Display more information on a specific command.

  version        Display version information.

commands.payload:
Andtech.Gooball 2.1.5+f0873dd8089b44f1ec2f7f1b4eba7f847d6e3bee
© Andtech Studios 2023

  open           (Default Verb) Open a Unity project with a Unity editor.

  build          Build a Unity project.

  test           Run tests on Unity project.

  run            Run arbitrary Unity commands.

  list           List installed editors.

  hide           Hide assets from the Unity asset database.

  set-version    Set the version number of a Unity project.

  serve          Start a local web server.

  help           Display more information on a specific command.

  version        Display version information.

result.stderr:
Andtech.Gooball 2.1.5+f0873dd8089b44f1ec2f7f1b4eba7f847d6e3bee
© Andtech Studios 2023

  --verbosity              Verbosity of logging

  --install-path           Location of Unity editor executables.

  -n, --dry-run            Dry run this command

  --execute-method         Execute the static method as soon as Unity opens the
                           project, and after the optional Asset server update
                           is complete.

  --build-target           Select an active build target before loading a
                           project.

  --log-file               Specify where Unity writes the Editor or
                           Windows/Linux/OSX standalone log file.

  --forget-project-path    Don't save your current Project into the Unity
                           launcher/hub history.

  --no-graphics            When you run this in batch mode, it does not
                           initialize the graphics device.

  --editor                 Describe which Unity Editor version to launch.

  -f, --follow             Output appended data as the Unity log grows. (same as
                           dumplog)

  --dumplog                Output appended data as the Unity log grows. (same as
                           follow)

  --no-powershell-shim     Prevents Gooball from launching Unity through a
                           powershell shim process

  --help                   Display this help screen.

  --version                Display version information.

  value pos. 0             (Default: ./) The path to the Unity project.
